description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden shelf unit with a modern, minimalist design. The structure consists of two main horizontal shelves supported by angled side frames, all made from a light-colored wood with a visible grain pattern. The upper and lower shelves are both open, providing easy access for storing or displaying items. The side supports are slightly splayed, giving the piece a distinctive geometric profile and added stability. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open and accessible nature. The overall finish is matte, highlighting the natural wood texture and making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, open wooden shelf unit with two tiers and angled side supports, finished in light wood grain. Its minimalist, accessible design is ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both open shelves and the angled side supports, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the flat upper surface and the full rectangular shape of the shelves.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the open shelving and side supports.
